findings: All employer dashboard pages build successfully with Next.js 16.2.9. Used Promise-based params and searchParams as required by Next.js 16. Client components (tag-input, modal, job-form, status-actions, applicant-filters, delete-job-button, company-form, edit-job-form, new-job-form-wrapper) use 'use client' directive. Server actions in employer-jobs.ts, employer-applications.ts, and company.ts verify ownership through the company chain. Status transitions validated: pending->shortlisted/rejected, shortlisted->accepted/rejected. Conversation auto-created on acceptance. All lint rules pass.
